summary: VenuLoQ UI Changes Verified - Full Brand Logo on Login/Register Pages & Compact Venue Cards on Search Page. Testing on mobile viewport (390x844). All 13 features tested successfully.

login_page_brand_logo.details: Full brand logo IMAGE displayed in dark top panel from CDN URL (customer-assets.emergentagent.com). data-testid='full-brand-logo' present and visible.

login_page_cream_background.details: Form area has cream background (#F4F1EC) - bg-[#F4F1EC] class confirmed

login_role_selector.details: Role selector present with RM, Venue, Admin buttons. Clicking Admin pre-fills admin@venuloq.in / admin123

admin_login_flow.details: Click Admin -> credentials auto-filled -> Submit -> Redirected to /admin/dashboard successfully. 'Welcome back!' toast displayed.

register_page_brand_logo.details: Full brand logo IMAGE displayed in dark top panel with tagline. Same CDN URL as login page.

register_page_form_fields.details: All form fields visible: Name, Email, Phone, Role selector (I am a), Password, Confirm Password, Submit button. Cream background present.

compact_venue_cards.details: 5+ venue cards visible per screen on 390x844 viewport (exceeds 3-4 requirement). Horizontal layout with flex gap-3, 110px square images on left, info on right.

venue_card_info_elements.details: Each compact card shows: venue image, name, location (area, city), venue type badge, capacity, price (/plate), favorite button

top_pick_badge.details: TOP badge appears on first card (Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai). Badge uses Crown icon with gold styling.

rating_badge.details: Rating badges visible on cards (e.g., 4.9, 4.8) with Star icon in white/95 background

filter_chips.details: Wedding, Corporate, Reception, Birthday filter chips present and functional. Active state shows bg-[#0B0B0D] dark background

venue_card_navigation.details: Clicking venue card navigates to detail page (e.g., /venues/mumbai/taj-mahal-palace-mumbai)

venue_detail_start_planning.details: Venue detail page loads correctly with sticky 'Start Planning' CTA button visible

brand_logo_verification.dark_panel_background: bg-[#0B0B0D] with venue image overlay and gradient

context_for_next_testing_agent: Two UI changes verified: 1) Login/Register pages now show actual brand logo IMAGE from CDN (customer-assets URL) in dark top panel with cream form area below. 2) MobileVenueCard on search page uses compact horizontal layout (110px square image left, info right) showing 5+ cards per screen on mobile. All filter chips, badges (Top Pick, Rating), and navigation work correctly.
